tasks.description: Create .github/workflows/main-ci-guard.yml that runs on pull_request events and checks the latest Tier 2 Governance run on main. If the run is not 'success', the guard fails, blocking the PR merge. Use actions/github-script@v9 to query the GitHub API.

acceptance_criteria.description: main-ci-guard.yml exists with on: pull_request trigger
Workflow checks latest Tier 2 Governance run on main via GitHub API
Guard fails when latest main CI run is not success
Workflow YAML is valid

tasks.summary: Create Pydantic response schemas for acceptance tests
tasks.description:
Create tests/acceptance/schemas.py with Pydantic models:
- HealthResponse (status: str)
- ListingsResponse (count: int, results: list, next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str])
- GrowthAreasResponse (areas: list, state: str, totalResults: int)
- ForeclosuresResponse (resultsCount: int, dataSources: list, location: str)
- LoginPageResponse (status_code: int, has_password_field: bool)
- StaticAssetResponse (status_code: int, content_type: str, body_size: int)

acceptance_criteria.description: schemas.py exists with all 6 Pydantic models
HealthResponse.model_validate({"status": "ok"}) succeeds
ListingsResponse.model_validate({"count": 0, "results": []}) succeeds
Pydantic validation raises ValidationError for malformed input

tasks.summary: Update existing acceptance tests to use Pydantic models
tasks.description: Update tests/acceptance/test_api.py and test_pages.py to use Pydantic model_validate() instead of raw dict access and isinstance checks. Each test should validate the full response shape, not just individual keys.

acceptance_criteria.description: TestHealthEndpoints uses HealthResponse.model_validate()
TestListingsAPI uses ListingsResponse.model_validate()
TestGrowthAreasAPI uses GrowthAreasResponse.model_validate()
TestForeclosuresAPI uses ForeclosuresResponse.model_validate()
All 9 acceptance tests pass against local container

tasks.summary: Add HTTP acceptance tests for property pipeline and authentication
tasks.description:
Create two new test files:

1. tests/acceptance/test_property_pipeline.py — tests the full property analysis workflow via HTTP:
   - Login → create property → add rental income → compute KPIs → verify results
   
2. tests/acceptance/test_authentication.py — tests auth endpoints:
   - Login with valid credentials returns 302 (redirect) and sets session cookie
   - Login with invalid credentials returns 200 (login page with error)
   - Logout clears session
   - Protected endpoint returns 302 redirect when unauthenticated

acceptance_criteria.description: test_property_pipeline.py exists with ≥3 HTTP-level tests
test_authentication.py exists with ≥3 HTTP-level tests
Login test validates session cookie is set on successful login
Pipeline test validates KPI values in response (NOI, cap rate)
All new tests pass against local container

tasks.summary: Add acceptance test gate to ci-quality.yml PR workflow
tasks.description:
Update .github/workflows/ci-quality.yml to include a new 'acceptance' job that:
1. Checkouts code
2. Installs httpx, beautifulsoup4, pydantic
3. Starts a Docker container via docker compose
4. Waits for health
5. Runs pytest tests/acceptance/
6. Cleans up

acceptance_criteria.description: ci-quality.yml has an 'acceptance' job
acceptance job runs pytest tests/acceptance/
pr-gates-pass job includes acceptance in its needs list
Workflow YAML is valid

tasks.description: Update the build-image job to log build start time, end time, and elapsed seconds. Add a warning step that fires if the build took longer than 600 seconds (10 minutes). Use date +%s for epoch-based timing.

acceptance_criteria.description: build-image job logs start timestamp at beginning
build-image job logs end timestamp and elapsed seconds at end
Warning is emitted if build time exceeds 600 seconds
Workflow YAML is valid

tasks.summary: Update Makefile with CI-focused acceptance test target
tasks.description: Update the Makefile test-acceptance target to work in CI (no xcode-select, no virtualenv dependency). Add a docker-compose based target that starts the stack, waits, runs tests, and cleans up.

acceptance_criteria.description: make test-acceptance works without xcode-select noise
make test-acceptance-ci starts docker compose, runs tests, cleans up
